title: brachyscome radicata var. polita
intro: Brachyscome radicata var. polita, commonly known as the small white daisy, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Brachyscome radicata var. polita can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and has also been used in topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
